mapper.sql: id, category_id, course_id, title, content, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_knowledge_point WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_knowledge_point WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_knowledge_point (category_id, course_id, title, content, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{courseId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_knowledge_point SET category_id = #{categoryId}, course_id = #{courseId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_knowledge_point SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
